title: aster altaicus var. scaber
intro: Aster altaicus var. scaber, also known as Korean mountain aster, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster altaicus var. scaber include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cancer due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Aster altaicus var. scaber can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
